description: Horizontal composite image. On the left, a man in a dark suit with a maroon tie stands at a wooden podium bearing the round seal of the U.S. Department of Labor ('DEPARTMENT OF LABOR / UNITED STATES OF AMERICA' with an eagle-and-shield emblem), with two American flags behind him and a blue backdrop. The backdrop shows a graphic with three white stars and red, white, and blue styling reading 'INVESTING IN TOMORROW'S WORKFORCE - Through Registered Apprenticeship'. On the right stands a printed event poster framed by American-flag graphics, reading 'BUILDING THE AI-READY WORKFORCE THROUGH REGISTERED APPRENTICESHIP - April 29, 2026', a banner 'National APPRENTICESHIP WEEK - APRIL 26 - MAY 2, 2026', and a blue directional arrow 'THIS WAY TO EVENT', with a small DOL seal.
notable_text: Investing in Tomorrow's Workforce Through Registered Apprenticeship. Building the AI-Ready Workforce Through Registered Apprenticeship, April 29, 2026. National Apprenticeship Week, April 26 - May 2, 2026. This Way to Event.
